name: Wedding Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Pound Macaroni - Elbows or Other Small Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil.
2. Add the soup bone, beef shank (as much as desired), and halved onion.
3. Once boiling, reduce heat to maintain a slow simmer.
4. Fill the pot 3/4 full with water from low heat.
5. After the initial boiling period, add the vegetables (frozen or fresh carrots and celery), parsley flakes, tomatoes, salt, and pepper.
6. Cook the macaroni separately until al dente, then drain and set aside.
7. Add the cooked macaroni to the soup just before serving.
8. For meatballs: prepare them as usual and add small pieces directly into the soup. Continue cooking with the soup on low heat.
9. Serve the soup in bowls topped with grated Parmesan cheese.
10. The soup is filling, whether served with meatballs or macaroni and meat.
